title: lepechinia betonicifolia
intro: Lepechinia betonicifolia, also known as Mexican mountain mint, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Mexico and Guatemala. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lepechinia betonicifolia include relief from digestive issues, reduced inflammation, and improved respiratory health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, or used topically in the form of salves or poultices, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
